## A Highly Interactive Training Course On

# Blockchain for Supply Chain Management

[Home](https://copextraining.com/) / [Fintech & Blockchain](https://copextraining.com/training-courses/fintech-blockchain) / Blockchain for Supply Chain Management

### Upcoming Sessions

### Course Introduction

Blockchain Supply Chain Management Training Courses are now pivotal in equipping professionals with the tools to meet rising demands for transparency, traceability, and accountability. This Blockchain for Supply Chain Management Training Course is a comprehensive program that explores how blockchain is revolutionizing supply chain ecosystems, enabling end-to-end visibility and secure transactions across multiple stakeholders.

Through this in-depth training course, participants will uncover the foundations of blockchain technology and learn how its decentralized, immutable ledger system can resolve persistent supply chain challenges such as counterfeit goods, data silos, and inefficient documentation. With a focus on practical application, the course explores successful blockchain implementation models across industries like retail, pharmaceuticals, automotive, agriculture, and logistics.

Participants will be introduced to the strategic and operational implications of blockchain, exploring smart contracts, real-time inventory tracking, and cross-border logistics enhancements. Whether you're looking to drive innovation, mitigate operational risk, or future-proof your supply chain, this Blockchain Supply Chain Management Course will provide the knowledge and confidence to lead digital transformation initiatives within your organization.

### Training Objectives

**By the end of this Blockchain Supply Chain Management Training Course, participants will be able to:**

### Training Methodology

This COPEX training course incorporates a blend of proven adult learning techniques to ensure comprehensive understanding and retention. Participants will engage in a mix of instructor-led presentations, real-life case studies, interactive group discussions, and scenario-based practical exercises. Emphasis will be placed on applying blockchain concepts to actual supply chain environments, allowing for immersive and actionable learning.

COPEX Training is your gateway to professional growth, with over 20 years of experience turning potential into success. Each year, we deliver over 1,000 courses in 50+ countries, earning a stellar 98% satisfaction rate. Trusted by global giants like BP, the United Nations, and HSBC, we partner with top certification bodies to provide career-focused training that empowers individuals and drives organizational breakthroughs. Our mission? To transform the way professionals learn and grow in today’s fast-changing industries. Through expert insights, cutting-edge methods, and hands-on approaches, we equip you with the skills and confidence to tackle challenges, seize opportunities, and thrive in your career.

Led by a passionate leadership team and supported by a network of world-class trainers, COPEX Training connects professionals worldwide with life-changing opportunities. We are committed to excellence, ensuring every participant leaves with the tools, expertise, and confidence to conquer an ever-evolving world.

### Frequently Asked Questions

This FAQ section provides quick answers to the most common questions about our services, procedures, and policies. We aim to make your experience with us as straightforward as possible. For further assistance, our support team is ready to help.

[COPEX](https://copextraining.com/) stands for “The Centre for Operations & Procurement Excellence”. Our courses are designed to develop and enhance the skills and knowledge of professionals across various sectors.

**Enhanced Skills:** Develop in-demand skills and knowledge in your chosen field.  
**Career Advancement:** Improve your career prospects and increase your earning potential.  
**Increased Confidence:** Gain confidence in your abilities and enhance your professional presence.  
**Networking Opportunities:** Connect with other professionals and industry experts.  
**Improved Job Performance:** Enhance your productivity, efficiency, and job satisfaction.  
**Personal Growth:** Develop valuable personal and professional skills that can benefit you in all areas of life.

**Experienced Instructors:** Courses are delivered by highly qualified and experienced instructors with industry expertise.  
**Interactive Learning:** Engaging and interactive learning methods, including workshops, simulations, case studies, and group discussions.  
**Practical Application:** Focus on practical skills and real-world applications, enabling you to apply your learning immediately.  
**Flexible Learning Options:** A variety of course formats available, including classroom training, online courses, and blended learning.  
**Certification & Recognition:** Upon successful completion, you may receive industry-recognized certifications.

The cost of COPEX training courses varies depending on the course duration, content, and delivery method.

There are several ways to register in our public training courses:  
**Online** – Browse the Training Plan, select the course of choice, click on the button  
“Register Now” inside the course outline page.  
**E-mail** – Send the details (name, company name, email address and training course of  
choice) of your nomination to [[email protected]](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#dcaeb9bb9cbfb3acb9a4a8aebdb5b2b5b2bbf2bfb3b1)  
Telephone – [+971 4 368 6886](tel:+97143686886) or [+971 50 106 2750](tel:+971501062750)

Upon successful registration, processing window will take not more than 24 hours from the time of registration. An email including the registration confirmation, invoice and joining instructions will be sent to the provided email address.

Published training course fees are inclusive of the training venue, training manual, writing materials, lunch and coffee breaks with refreshments over the entire duration of the training course.

The training course fee can be settled by either:

Our training courses will run for 5 hours per day. The standard daily timing is from 8:30 am – 3:30 pm including the coffee/tea breaks and lunch.

Our training courses courses are being held at five-star hotels in prime and iconic destinations across the globe. Cities such as Amsterdam, Barcelona, Dubai, Geneva, Istanbul, Kuala Lumpur, London, Houston, New York, Paris, Vienna, Zurich, etc.

Once officially registered, we can assist by providing the corporate rates provided by the hotel where the training course will be conducted. Early confirmation will enable us to secure the room at reduced rates

Our cancellation policy varies depending on the circumstances presented. Generally, cancellations must be initiated in formal writing at least 14 days prior to the commencement date of the training course. Further, the option to shift an existing registration to another training course on a later date is possible. Otherwise, a full refund will be initiated.

Delegates who will attend and successfully complete the training course will earn a COPEX Certificate of Completion. This certification is designed to validate the successful knowledge transfer, and that the desired learning objectives and outcomes to further advance your professional competency are achieved.

![ISCEA_CBSCP I.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/726b46_7278fb9902e0431ebd778b8b08bf3f54~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_150,h_132,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ISCEA_CBSCP%20I.png)

#### LEVEL 1 SUPPLY CHAINS NEED BLOCKCHAIN TO IMPROVE EFFICIENCY AND TRANSPARENCY FOR ALL STAKEHOLDERS

The Blockchain for the Supply Chain course enables supply chain managers and decision-making executives to evaluate their supply chain models and operations impacted by introducing blockchain technology. In addition to understanding the foundational aspects of blockchain, participants will see how this technology changes operational deployment to their benefit.

​

Questions We’ll Explore

​

How are smart contracts used within a supply chain?

What are the current blockchain supply chain use cases?

What logistics companies are currently making use of blockchain technology?

How do IoT (internet of things) and blockchain technology work together?

Do supply chain managers need to understand blockchain?

​

Upon successful completion of this intensive program, participants will be able to:

​

Comprehend blockchain fundamentals;

Explain smart contracts and consensus protocols;

Compare public vs. private chains required for different blockchain solutions;

Analyze real-life use cases for different supply chain models

Construct a strategy to make use of blockchain for varying supply chain needs

#### MODULE 1

#### BLOCKCHAIN OVERVIEW

Blockchain 101

Crypto 101

Hashing & Mining

Blockchain Properties

Public vs Private

Consensus Mechanisms

Security Challenges

#### MODULE 3

#### SUPPLY CHAINS

Understanding Supply Chains

Supply Chain Pain-Points

#### MODULE 5

#### USE CASES

Use Cases

Use Cases (cont.)

Use Cases (final)

#### MODULE 2

#### SMART CONTRACTS

Smart Contracts 101

Smart Contracts 201

Oracles & Legal Issues

#### MODULE 4

#### BLOCKCHAIN FOR THE SUPPLY CHAIN – AGREEMENTS & CONTRACTS

Blockchain for the Supply Chain

Agreements and Contracts

#### MODULE 6

#### REGULATION AND COMPLIANCE

Regulatory Challenges

Compliance Challenges

Blockchain Secrets

![ISCEA_CBSCP II.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/726b46_79afd5d11c4247de8144db7f4b0d4d46~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_150,h_132,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/ISCEA_CBSCP%20II.jpg)

#### LEVEL 2 TECHNOLOGIES PROVIDE SUPPLY CHAIN CAPABILITIES THAT WERE NOT POSSIBLE IN THE PAST: IOT, BIG DATA, BLOCKCHAIN, MACHINE LEARNING, DEEP LEARNING, AND AUGMENTED REALITY.

The Blockchain Supply Chain Professional program is an intensive offering designed to illustrate where supply chain models and operations where blockchain technology will have an impact. In addition to understanding this technology’s foundational aspect, participants will see how blockchain technology is changing the operational deployment to their benefit.

​

Supply Chain professionals will understand the available platforms, hosting, associated technologies, languages, and security paramount to any POC or enterprise deployment success. Supply chain managers and professionals whose businesses are directly impacted by supply chains provide the framework and non-technical language to work with blockchain developers capable of deploying enterprise-grade solutions.

​

Questions We’ll Explore

​

How does blockchain work?

What blockchains focus on the supply chain and what use cases exist?

What is blockchain governance in practice?

How are smart contracts used within a supply chain?

How do IoT (internet of things) and blockchain technology work together?

Do supply chain managers need to understand blockchain?

Who are the participants in a blockchain project?

How many transactions per second can existing blockchains compute?

Upon successful completion of this intensive program, participants will be able to:

​

Analyze real-life use cases for different supply chain models

Construct a strategy to make use of blockchain for varying supply chain needs

Comprehend blockchain fundamentals

Explain smart contracts and consensus protocols

Compare public vs private chains required for different blockchain solutions.

Capability to coordinate and implement blockchain solutions for supply chain stakeholder needs.

#### MODULE 1

#### BLOCKCHAIN FOUNDATIONS

Blockchain Background and Basics

Different Types of Blockchains

Consensus

Cryptography and Hashing

Smart Contracts

Blockchain Wallets

Pros and Cons

Public Blockchain-Based Applications

Blockchain and Crypto Regulation

Regulatory Reporting

Distributed Autonomous Organizations

Blockchain Today

The Trilemma

#### MODULE 3

#### BLOCKCHAIN DEVELOPMENT DECISION

Development Essentials

Platforms

Hosting and Mining Decisions

Associated Technologies

Development Languages

Security and Implementation Goals

Risk Management

Digital Transformation & Summary

#### MODULE 5

#### BLOCKCHAIN FOR SUPPLY CHAIN

Blockchain Overview

Smart Contracts

Supply Chains

Blockchain for the Supply Chain – Agreements & Contracts

Use Cases

Regulation and Compliance

Barries and Opstacles

Challenges, Goals, and Roadmap

#### MODULE 2

#### BLOCKCHAIN & BITCOIN INTENSIVE

Bitcoin Overview

Technical Limitations & Mining Introduction

Mining

Bitcoin vs Protocols 2.0, 3.0, 4.0…etc.

The New Database

Payments, Voting and other Use Cases

What’s next?

#### MODULE 4

#### KEY MANAGEMENT

Key Management Overview

Key Generation

Key Management and Storage

Risks

#### MODULE 6

#### INTRODUCTION TO THE AGILE BLOCKCHAIN

Agile Methodologies and the Blockchain Layers

Scrum, Lean, XP, and DevOps Methodologies

Agile Economics, working incrementally

Backlog, Sprints/Iterations, Velocity, Stories, Points, Working Product Increments

Events: Vision, Planning, Daily Stand Up, Refinement

Reviewing and Improving based on working products

Release on demand

The unique aspects of the Blockchain layer in the Agile strategy

#### Perfect Program For

Specific job titles that would benefit from this program include Director Logistics & Distribution, Business Analyst, Contracts Manager, Procurement Manager, Project Manager, Transportation Coordinator, and aspiring supply chain professionals.

#### Course Includes

Classroom hours led by an experienced supply chain management expert. 

Study guide with all slides and exercises.

100 multiple choice question exam (70% minimum pass mark)

#### When will I receive confirmation of my registration?

Once your registration is successfully completed, you will receive a confirmation email within 24 hours. This email will contain your registration details, invoice, and the necessary joining instructions for the course.

The training fees include full access to the training venue, along with comprehensive training materials to enhance your learning experience. # Corporate Blockchain in Supply Chain Management Training Course

Edstellar's instructor-led Blockchain in Supply Chain Management training course equips teams with blockchain solutions to leverage blockchain technology, enhancing transparency, efficiency, and security across supply chain operations. Empower your professionals to achieve a resilient, responsive, and sustainable supply chain with our training.

## Drive Team Excellence with Blockchain in Supply Chain Management Corporate Training

Empower your teams with expert-led on-site, off-site, and virtual Blockchain in Supply Chain Management Training through Edstellar, a premier corporate training provider for organizations globally. Designed to meet your specific training needs, this group training program ensures your team is primed to drive your business goals. Help your employees build lasting capabilities that translate into real performance gains.

Blockchain in Supply Chain Management is an innovative approach that utilizes blockchain technology to revolutionize how supply chains operate, making them more transparent, efficient, and secure. The core objective of this method is to create a decentralized and immutable ledger for all transactions within a network, thereby allowing for real-time tracking of assets and products from production to delivery. Blockchain in Supply Chain Management training course equips teams with the skills to leverage blockchain for improving transparency, implementing smart contracts, enhancing traceability, and optimizing real-time tracking. Through this training, teams can achieve significant cost reductions, foster greater collaboration among supply chain participants, and ensure a more resilient and responsive supply chain.

Edstellar's instructor-led Blockchain in Supply Chain Management training course is delivered through virtual/onsite training options by industry experts with extensive expertise in the domain. The course stands out for its expertly crafted practical curriculum, customized to meet your organization's needs. The course equips professionals with hands-on experience and insights to effectively apply blockchain technology in their supply chain management processes.

enriched_points.expanded_content: Implementing targeted workshops and seminars equips supply chain professionals with blockchain knowledge, enhancing their ability to improve transparency and traceability in operations.
Investing in blockchain education fosters a skilled workforce that can effectively navigate supply chain challenges, driving innovation and operational efficiency across various sectors.
Promoting an innovative mindset encourages teams to explore blockchain applications, leading to creative solutions that enhance supply chain transparency and streamline processes.
